content.en:
The boundary of the Hunhe River, the bank of the Hunhe River.

This is where all the turbidity of the Hunhe River Gap is located, and few creatures come here.

Ye Tian also knew about this place, so he came over to take a look.

As a result, when he entered the bank of the Hunhe River, he encountered an incomparably terrifying bone transformation realm creature.

Rumble!!!!

A creature covered in countless tentacles devours the filth of the Hunhe River.

Ye Tian wanted to escape, but was also swept away and devoured by one of the other party's tentacles.

【Hunhe Behemoth】

That's the name of the other party.

And Ye Tian's copying talent also probed an ancient-level ancestral endowment on the other party's body-Devouring!

Ye Tian copied the other party's primeval-level ancestral endowment, and then the other copied bodies began to fuse.

Soon, the Devouring Ancient Grade Ancestral Fu was fused.

"The shackles can be broken at any time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

The boundary of the territorial sea is seamed, and the sea is too Xuanhai.

Ye Tian's true body copy body began to impact the Nine Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level genius level, once he broke through, his strength would increase to an incomparably terrifying level.

Click!!!

The bottleneck was easily shattered by Ye Tian, and his heart began to transform, and a large amount of resources were devoured and refined by him, prompting his heart to transform rapidly.

After that, the Infinite Blood also began its ninth metamorphosis.

Time flies.

Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger, and his physical body became more and more terrifying.

A long time passed, and Ye Tian's ninth blood transformation was finally completed.

"It's successful, I've already broken through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian could feel that his strength had far surpassed before.

After that, he used his true body to replicate his body and practiced both the Ancient Astral Technique and the Ancient Golden Body Technique, so that the imprint of the Ancient Technique was integrated into his body, making his body strong again.

Subsequently.

He began to cultivate more primeval techniques, such as the devouring primeval technique - the primeval devouring technique, and the bloodline primeval technique - the primeval blood explosion technique and other primeval techniques.

Since he had the corresponding primordial-level ancestral endowment, it was easy to practice.

Other than that.

He also cultivated other primeval techniques, and anyway, he had traded a large amount of primeval gold blood from the Lord of Darkness, so it could be used to assist in the cultivation of primeval techniques.

But for a while, he didn't practice other primeval techniques so quickly.

......

Hunhe River Boundary Seam.

Ye Tian continued to look for other primordial-level ancestral endowments, and he could feel that he had not been in the Hunhe Realm for long, so he had to find as many primordial-level ancestral endowments as possible.

And just like that, another period of time passed.

During this period, Ye Tian found a few more primordial-level ancestral endowments, and after copying and fusing them, his potential foundation was improved again.

I have to say that the primeval-level ancestral endowment of the Hunhe Boundary Crack is not too rare.

If it is in the boundary of the territorial waters, it is almost an extravagant hope to find the primeval-level ancestral endowment.

Anyway, he hasn't found an ancient-level ancestor in the territorial sea boundary rift until now, but there must be an ancient-level ancestral endowment in the territorial sea boundary rift, maybe a certain bone transformation realm exists and has an ancient-level ancestral endowment.

However, those bone metamorphosis exists that are not easy to find.

this day.

The Hunhe River Boundary Crack finally repelled Ye Tian.

After coming out of the Hunhe River Realm, Ye Tian immediately went to find the Lord of Darkness.

Dark Sea.

Ye Tian visited the Lord of Darkness, and soon he met the Lord of Darkness.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, do you have something to do?"

The Lord of Darkness asked.

"Lord of Darkness, I have brought something back from the rift of the Hunhe River Realm, and I need the Lord of Darkness to help me extract it. "

As he spoke, Ye Tian took out a part of the Mixed Ruins Stone.

Even some of them are still terrifying.

The Lord of Darkness was shocked to see so many ruin stones.

"Ruined Stone !!!"

He naturally knew the Mixed Ruins Stone, this was the resource of the Mixed Ruins Sea, he didn't expect Ye Tian to get so many Mixed Ruins Stone from the Hunhe River Boundary Crack.

If he had found it, he would not have believed it.

Because the forces of the Hunhe Boundary Crack also know the value of the Mixed Ruins Stone, they must have occupied it a long time ago, and even the Mixed Ruins Cave needs the Mixed Ruins Stone!

"Didn't you loot the treasure house of some great power's Chaos Stone?"

The Lord of Darkness was surprised.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

The Lord of Darkness had to admire Ye Tian's courage to dare to do this, and he was still alive to bring out these ruin stones.

"I can help you extract the Mixed Ruins, but it's hard work, so I'll need to collect thirty percent of the Mixed Ruins. The Lord of Darkness said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Thirty percent of the mixed ruin liquid is not much, like the mixed ruin cave to collect the mixed ruin stone of the Fire Ancient Clan, and only give a little bit of mixed ruin liquid to the Fire Ancient Clan, it is estimated that there may not even be one percent.

This is also one of the reasons why the Fire Ancient Clan is reluctant to offer all the Mixed Ruins Stone.

Wow!

The Lord of Darkness took the Chaos Stone and declared a retreat, actually going to extract the Chaos Liquid.

......

Taixuanhai.

Ye Tian took out many low-grade sunfish tears and used them to cultivate the human race blood transformation realm.

In particular, his son Ye Xingchen gained more sunfish tears.

In addition, he is also preparing to train his son to become an ancient genius.

This time, he is going to give an ancient-level ancestral endowment to his son, that is, an ancient-level ancestral endowment-Xingchen, which is also an ancient-level ancestral endowment that he has encountered and found, which is very suitable for his son's path.

Therefore, he transferred to his son Ye Xingchen.

With this primeval-level ancestral endowment, Ye Xingchen could easily practice the primeval technique of the star type.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen chose an ancient technique-the Ancient Star Spear!

Sure enough, it didn't take long for Ye Xingchen to successfully practice the Ancient Star Spear and successfully become an Ancient Genius.

Coupled with the large amount of sunfish tears that Ye Tian gave him, his cultivation also skyrocketed.

Otherwise, how long would it take for Ye Xingchen to become a seven-time Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level genius.

Of course.

Ye Tian was also refining a large number of Eight Blood Transformation Realm Taigu Fish's Ancient Fish Tears to refine his heart.

Although he had reached the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, if he wanted to impact the Bone Transformation Realm, he had to temper his heart to the extreme of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian is also contemplating the Taikoo Jinwen and creating more top-notch Taikoo bone techniques.

During this period of time, Ye Tian's strength was skyrocketing.

this day.

The Lord of Darkness informed Ye Tian that all those Mixed Ruins Stones had been extracted.

Swish!

Ye Tian came to the Dark Sea and saw the Lord of Darkness again.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, these ruin liquids are for you!"

The Lord of Darkness took out a large amount of Ruin Liquid, which surprised Ye Tiandu.

"Thank you, Lord of Darkness!"

Ye Tian thanked.
